headline: Synopsys (SNPS) Valuation Check As Shares Stall And Ansys Deal Reshapes Growth Story
summary: Why Synopsys stock is drawing investor attention now Synopsys (SNPS) is back on many investors’ watchlists after a mixed stretch, with the share price roughly flat over the past year and showing a decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Synopsys. At a share price of US$432.65, Synopsys has seen a 1 day share price return of a 1.05% decline and a 90 day share price return of a 9.07% decline. Its 5 year total shareholder return of 84.85% contrasts with a much softer 0.46%...
